data.title: Students from Italy working in the studio

data.content:
Spending the past month in Aalborg as Erasmus students has been an incredible experience for Vanessa and me, Aurora. As our time here comes to a close on August 26th, we reflect on the amazing opportunities and memories we've gained. Over the past few weeks, we’ve had the chance to work closely with Grethe on social media management, which has been both challenging and deeply rewarding.

In addition to work, we immersed ourselves in the local culture. We explored the Aalborg Museum of Modern Art, enjoyed a relaxing beauty night, and attended the Mors CulturalFestival.

![](/uploads/2247-italian-birthday-3.jpg)

 

One of the highlights was celebrating a birthday with an Italian-themed party at Grethe’s studio, where many Aalborg locals and fellow Erasmus students joined us for a night filled with great food, music, and cultural exchange.

 

 

 

 

 

![](/uploads/2248-italian-birthday.jpg)

 

For more details about our experience, including an interview with Grethe and us, check out the full story on the [website of the newspaper](https://hasserisavis.dk/italienske-studerende-hjaelper-lokal-kunstner/?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTEAAR0Jm2USwTaiKxC6-oSA_1yBZa0jvewSapyWZvh4dra0Qw_b80t3hD5w-fY_aem_kIW-9dPiPfmlG7PoSEzP-w). This Erasmus experience has been incredibily valuable, offering new skills, wonderful connections  and memories that we will treasure forever. Aalborg will always hold a special place in our hearts.
